name: Deploy to Hostinger

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, master ]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      confirm_deployment:
        description: 'Type "DEPLOY" to confirm production deployment (manual only)'
        required: false
        default: ''
      deployment_notes:
        description: 'What are you deploying? (optional)'
        required: false
        default: ''

env:
  DEPLOY_PATH: /opt/apps/KPMG-WS2-Final-Testing

jobs:
  deploy:
    name: Deploy to Hostinger
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: SAFETY CHECK - Manual confirmation required
        if: github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
        run: |
          if [[ "${{ github.event.inputs.confirm_deployment }}" != "DEPLOY" ]]; then
            echo "DEPLOYMENT CANCELLED"
            echo "You must type 'DEPLOY' exactly to confirm"
            echo "This prevents accidental deployments"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Manual deployment confirmed - proceeding"
          echo "Deployment notes: ${{ github.event.inputs.deployment_notes }}"

      - name: Install SSHpass
        run: sudo apt-get install -y sshpass

      - name: Pull latest code on server
        run: |
          SSHPASS='${{ secrets.HOSTINGER_PASSWORD }}' sshpass -e ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=30 ${{ secrets.HOSTINGER_USER }}@${{ secrets.HOSTINGER_HOST }} "
            mkdir -p $DEPLOY_PATH &&
            cd $DEPLOY_PATH &&
            if [ ! -d .git ]; then
              git clone https://github.com/Vardandatasciences/KPMG-WS2-Final-Testing.git .
            else
              git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/main
            fi
          "

      - name: Stop containers
        run: |
          SSHPASS='${{ secrets.HOSTINGER_PASSWORD }}' sshpass -e ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${{ secrets.HOSTINGER_USER }}@${{ secrets.HOSTINGER_HOST }} "
            cd $DEPLOY_PATH &&
            docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.production.yml down 2>/dev/null || true
          "

      - name: Build and start containers
        run: |
          SSHPASS='${{ secrets.HOSTINGER_PASSWORD }}' sshpass -e ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${{ secrets.HOSTINGER_USER }}@${{ secrets.HOSTINGER_HOST }} "
            cd $DEPLOY_PATH &&
            docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.production.yml build --no-cache &&
            docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.production.yml up -d
          "

      - name: Deployment Complete
        run: |
          echo "DEPLOYMENT DONE!"
          echo "Server: ${{ secrets.HOSTINGER_HOST }}"
          echo "Path: $DEPLOY_PATH"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
